records.ety: [F. surpasser; sur over + passer to pass. See Sur-, and Pass.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Surpassed (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Surpassing.]

defs: To go beyond in anything good or bad; to perform (an activity) better than; to exceed; to excel.
quotes: This would surpass Common revenge and interrupt his joy.
